name: Tangerine and Honey-Glazed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the zest of 1 tangerine (the colored part of the peel) and squeeze enough juice to obtain about half a cup. Slice the remaining tangerine into wedges. Place the juice in a large bowl; add honey, soy sauce, garlic, and 1/2 teaspoon freshly ground pepper. Mix well. Add chicken pieces and turn to coat evenly. Cover, and marinate in the refrigerator for 2 to 3 hours, turning the chicken occasionally.
2. Preheat the oven to 400°F. Line a large jelly-roll pan with aluminum foil.
3. Drain the marinade into a saucepan and boil until reduced by half.
4. Arrange the chicken skin side down on the prepared jelly-roll pan. Bake for 40 minutes or until cooked through, basting every 10 minutes with marinade and pan juices. Garnish with tangerine wedges.
NUTRITIONAL INFORMATION/SERVING:
446 calories
69 grams protein
15 grams carbohydrates
15 grams fat
181 milligrams cholesterol
690 milligrams sodium
